description: AISP 5.1 Crystal Atom specification with section-level sub-atoms. Target: < 2% ambiguity. All 5 Crystal Atom components present.

omega.label: Formal Objective
omega.description: Formal render objective with constraints (no prose). Defines what to build and key invariants.
omega.example: render(Site, title) | |sections| = N ∧ theme.preset = X ∧ theme.mode = Y ∧ theme.typography.fontFamily = Z

sigma.label: Type System
sigma.description: Formal type definitions for all data structures used in the specification.

types.name: MasterConfig
types.definition: { site: Site, theme: Theme, sections: Section 𝕃 }

types.name: Site
types.definition: { title: 𝕊, description: 𝕊, author: 𝕊, domain: 𝕊 }

types.name: Theme
types.definition: { preset: 𝕊, mode: 𝕊, palette: Palette, typography: Typography, spacing: Spacing }

types.name: Palette
types.definition: { bg₁: 𝕊, bg₂: 𝕊, txt₁: 𝕊, txt₂: 𝕊, acc₁: 𝕊, acc₂: 𝕊 }

types.name: Typography
types.definition: { fontFamily: 𝕊, headingFamily: 𝕊, headingWeight: ℕ, baseSize: 𝕊, lineHeight: ℝ }

types.name: Spacing
types.definition: { sectionPadding: 𝕊, containerMaxWidth: 𝕊, componentGap: 𝕊 }

types.name: Section
types.definition: { type: SectionType, id: 𝕊, variant: 𝕊, heading: 𝕊?, subheading: 𝕊?, layout: Layout, style: Style, components: Component 𝕃 }

types.name: Layout
types.definition: { display: 𝕊, direction: 𝕊?, columns: ℕ?, gap: 𝕊, padding: 𝕊 }

types.name: Style
types.definition: { background: 𝕊, color: 𝕊, fontFamily: 𝕊?, borderRadius: 𝕊? }

types.name: Component
types.definition: { id: 𝕊, type: 𝕊, enabled: 𝔹, props: Map⟨𝕊, Any⟩ }

types.name: SectionType
types.definition: {hero, menu, columns, pricing, action, footer, quotes, questions, numbers, gallery, logos, team, image, divider, text}

gamma.label: Constraint Rules
gamma.description: Concrete, data-specific constraint rules. Global rules apply site-wide; section-level rules are parameterized per section instance.

sectionRuleStructure.description: Each section type has its own rule generator producing concrete rules from actual data values.

lambda.label: Data Bindings
lambda.description: Complete data bindings for all site, theme, and section values. Every component prop for every component is included inline.

sectionBindings.description: Per-section bindings include variant, heading, subheading, background, color, columns, gap, padding, display, direction, and all component props.

epsilon.label: Verification Evidence
epsilon.description: Formal verification checks at both global and section level.

globalVerifications.check: All component text content is rendered

sectionVerifications.description: Each section sub-atom includes its own evidence checks verifying variant, component count, and data-specific values.

crystalAtomStructure.description: Master Crystal Atom with per-section sub-atoms
